title: Declaring a randc non-`packed` struct produces internal error: Unexpected randc variable dtype

features.name: randc modifier on non-packed struct in class
features.description: Code should include a randc modifier applied to a non-packed struct that is a class member variable, triggering an internal error when randomize() is called

features.name: randomize call on class with randc struct member
features.description: Code should include a randomize() method call on a class instance where the class contains a randc struct member, triggering the randc struct internal error
